chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.474 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 21.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Farooq, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ----------------------------------------- Applicant/accused is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant submits that the parties have settled their dispute out the Court and they have filed compromise application before learned trial Court, which has been accepted and the applicant has been acquitted of the charge by way of compromise. In view of above, instant criminal bail application stands dismissed as having become infructuous. So far as the surety furnished in instant criminal bail application is concerned, it is no more required, the same shall be released to the Surety, after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
